title: Star Fox 64 Youtube Poop: Team Star Wolf Disbands
description:
Just what I need to see. Another one of my overrated/overwatched YTPs.

Video/Audio Used: 

Star Fox 64/Lylat Wars 
Transformers the Movie (1986) 
X-Men (1990s cartoon) 
Oh Yeah 
Star Fox Assault  
Sonic X 
Donkey Kong Country (TV show) 
Adventures of Sonic the Hedgehog 
Spanish Flea 
Super Mario World (TV show)
Transformers Headmasters 
Monty Python and the Holy Grail 

Starring: 
Wolf O'Donnell 
Pigma Dengar 
Leon Powalski 
Andrew Oikonny 

Guest Starring:
Peppy Hare

Plot Synopsis: 

Things turn for the worse when Wolf and Pigma have a quarrel amongst themselves. Peppy advises them to kill their fathers. Wolf starts having visions of the future. The future Wolf teaches him how to do a barrel roll. Then, madness ensues. (inb4 SPARTA). 

This was my first and only video to include one of those crappy intro things.
